title: Defiled Lands Retextured
description: A retexture of the mod, Defiled Lands
body:
This resourcepack changes the textures of the mod, Defiled Lands.

Featuring;
- Animated textures!
- Emissive support for those who use shaders.

![A retextured version of the Defiled Lands items.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/a9VuVMRW/images/2e0c2fd33f81729c62ea1cfec871bbaffdb14328.jpeg)

![A retextured version of the Defiled Lands items.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/a9VuVMRW/images/19b4b41c365e66cf43fd9a75a11ae914a9001694.jpeg)
